text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Sirius! Lay off Prez, would you?!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I just saw you two, and it looked like you were
arguing! Prez even seemed scared for a moment!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I swear, she's surrounded by the worst...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Calm down. Here, have a treat to chew on.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wait, candy? Wowie, thank y—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey! Don't treat me like a little kid!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: What? I thought you liked candy.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well yeah, I do! But now's not the time for that!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sirius...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Do you hate Prez?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You heard me! You're always going off on her!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Don't get things twisted. This isn't a matter of me
liking or hating her.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: It's just...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Just?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...I'll tell you once you're able to drink coffee.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh, what do you mean by that? I can drink
coffee just fine!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Aww, sure you can.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I told you to quit treating me like a child!
